title: Organization Repurposes Firearms into Garden Tools and Art
summary: An organization is transforming unwanted firearms into garden tools, art, and jewelry, giving them a new purpose.
charlotte_impact: Highlights innovative solutions for firearm disposal and promotes creative reuse within the community.

title: Serene Sunday Forecast Before Wet Weather Returns
summary: Expect a pleasant Sunday with highs in the 70s, followed by rain and potential storms on Monday.
charlotte_impact: Provides a weather update, alerting residents to prepare for upcoming rain and possible severe weather.

title: Charlotte Mayoral Applications: Council Weighs Requirements
summary: Charlotte City Council is considering requirements for mayoral applications, including a nonbinding question about 2027 intentions.
charlotte_impact: Informs potential candidates about the application process for the upcoming mayoral election.

title: Shelby Officer Fired; SBI Investigates Use of Force
summary: A Shelby police officer was fired, and the NC SBI is investigating a use-of-force incident at the request of local authorities.
charlotte_impact: Addresses concerns about police conduct and accountability within the Shelby Police Department.

title: Shooting Reported in Northeast Charlotte
summary: One person was shot on Graypark Drive near Orr Street in northeast Charlotte. Police are investigating.
charlotte_impact: Reports a violent incident, raising concerns about public safety in the northeast Charlotte area.

title: Flooding Strands Cars, Closes Restaurants in Union County
summary: Widespread flooding in Union County has led to stranded vehicles and the closure of a restaurant, impacting local activities.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the impact of severe weather on local businesses and community events in Union County.

title: Fan Reflects on Meeting NASCAR Legend Kyle Busch
summary: Pamela Hauck shares her memories of an unexpected final meeting with NASCAR legend Kyle Busch before his passing.
charlotte_impact: Offers a personal reflection on the life and legacy of a well-known NASCAR figure.

title: Greg Biffle's Ex-Wife Files Wrongful Death Lawsuit in Plane Crash
summary: Nicole Biffle is suing over a plane crash that killed 7, alleging negligence led to the fatal incident at Statesville Regional Airport.
charlotte_impact: Reports on legal action following a tragic aviation accident, raising questions of accountability.

title: Technical Issues Disrupt CMS End-of-Year Testing
summary: Charlotte-Mecklenburg Schools face technical problems during end-of-year testing, causing anxiety among students and concern from parents.
charlotte_impact: Addresses the impact of technical failures on student testing and the educational system.

title: Couple Wins $1.6M Judgment Over Construction Issues
summary: A Denver couple won a $1.6 million judgment against Nest Homes for breach of contract and fraudulent misrepresentation related to construction.
charlotte_impact: Illustrates the potential legal and financial consequences of construction disputes and contractor misconduct.

title: Shelby Officer Suspended for Punching Woman During Arrest
summary: A Shelby police officer was suspended after being recorded punching a woman during an arrest. The officer's identity has not been released.
charlotte_impact: Raises serious concerns about police brutality and the use of excessive force during arrests.

title: Thieves Target Clover Neighborhood for Second Time
summary: Multiple vehicles were broken into in Clover, with at least one gun stolen during the spree of car break-ins this week.
charlotte_impact: Highlights ongoing crime issues in the Clover neighborhood and the risk of firearm theft.

title: Salisbury Teacher Arrested on Sex Offense Charges
summary: David Steelman, 51, turned himself in on multiple sex offense charges involving a former student, dating back to 2012.
charlotte_impact: Reports on serious allegations of sexual misconduct by a teacher, raising concerns about student safety.

title: Charlotte Douglas Airport Receives $46.9M for Expansion
summary: The FAA awarded Charlotte Douglas International Airport $46.9 million to expand the airport apron, improving infrastructure.
charlotte_impact: Announces funding for airport improvements, which will enhance capacity and efficiency.

title: Man Dies Months After Hit-and-Run in North Charlotte
summary: Frank Leon Dent died 10 months after a hit-and-run on West Sugar Creek Road. Police seek information on the driver.
charlotte_impact: Reports on a fatal hit-and-run, emphasizing the need for public assistance in identifying the responsible driver.
